data.content: Deployment issue: implementation on branch foolery-f8f4 (commit d661bd7e 'fix(beats): reset create-more form after success') is correct and complete — 3-file diff exactly matches the plan — but was never merged to main. No PR was opened and origin/main does not contain the changes. Shipment step must merge this branch to main and verify CI green before re-entering shipment_review.
